chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-2014 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders of CMA 7905/25 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For orders on CMA 7906/25 4.For orders on CMA 7907/25 5.For hearing of main case 25-11-2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the petitioners. *** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to5. After arguing the matter at some length, counsel for the petitioners submits that the petitioners being civil servants will approach the proper forum, available under the law, for redressal of their grievance(s). Order accordingly. Accordingly, this petition along with listed application(s) stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
